system:
You answer questions about a synthetic world using ONLY the provided episode excerpts.

Episode statements and their exact semantics:
- Observation "valid from day X": the fact holds at EVERY day >= X, forever. Facts never expire on their own.
- Observation "valid from day X until day Y": the fact holds for X <= day < Y.
- Policy (IF conditions THEN conclusion): at the evaluation day, if all conditions hold (matching shared variables like ?A consistently), the conclusion holds. Policies chain: a conclusion may satisfy another policy's condition.
- A policy applies only from its effective day onward, and only if not superseded.
- UNLESS exception: if the exception pattern is satisfiable for that binding, the policy does not fire for it.
- Supersession notice: from the stated day, the old policy stops applying (entirely, or only for bindings matching the stated condition). A superseded policy's conclusions are gone from that day unless re-derivable another way.
- Higher authority policies beat lower authority ones when they conflict; later-issued beats earlier at equal authority.

Answering:
- The question names the evaluation day. Evaluate at exactly that day.
- Answer true only if the fact is stated valid at that day or derivable via policies from facts valid at that day. Otherwise answer false.
- For true/false questions reply with exactly one word: true or false.
- For list questions reply with ONLY a JSON array of entity IDs, e.g. ["customer_03","customer_07"], or [] if none.

Episodes:

=== Episode ep_207 (day 116) ===
On day 116, partner_05's projection fct_1012 expects that operates_in(asset=asset_16, jurisdiction=jurisdiction_07) will come to hold.
A separate attribution register is opened for partner_05, effective day 116; from this point forward, every submission from partner_05 is logged only as partner_05's own filing, kept apart from the desk's direct factual record.
Logged on day 116, policy rul_002 ("eligible_for policy 2") at authority level 2, in force from day 116, provides: where operates_in(asset=?D, jurisdiction=?A), offered_in(product=?E, asset=?B), and rated_as(asset=?B, partner=?C) all hold, eligible_for(jurisdiction=?A, asset=?B, partner=?C) follows, unless operates_in(asset=asset_19, jurisdiction=?A) also holds.

=== Episode ep_201 (day 112) ===
Policy rul_004 ("restricted_in policy 2", authority level 4) was logged on day 110 and effective from day 110: IF holds(sector=?A, partner=?B) AND rated_as(asset=?C, partner=?B) AND member_of(customer=?D, sector=?A, jurisdiction=?E) THEN restricted_in(sector=?A, partner=?B, asset=?C).
On day 111, registry_A records fct_0211 as valid from day 111: operates_in(asset=asset_18, jurisdiction=jurisdiction_13).
registry_B’s entry fct_0508, logged on day 111 and valid from day 111, notes registered_in(product=product_14, customer=customer_08).
Also on day 111, registry_B’s fct_0544 (valid from day 111) shows operates_in(asset=asset_19, jurisdiction=jurisdiction_07).
audit_note fct_0012, logged on day 112 and valid from day 112, confirms supplies(product=product_25, partner=partner_16).

=== Episode ep_173 (day 85) ===
On day 84, registry_B recorded fct_0336 — effective from day 84 — noting member_of(customer=customer_13, sector=sector_04, jurisdiction=jurisdiction_13).
A field_report entry on day 85 — reference fct_0140, effective from day 85 — notes member_of(customer=customer_21, sector=sector_01, jurisdiction=jurisdiction_00).
registry_A logged fct_0227 on day 85, valid from day 85, showing partnered_with(partner=partner_13, product=product_12, sector=sector_15).
A customer_disclosure entry on day 85, valid from day 85, cites fct_0467: rated_as(asset=asset_19, partner=partner_08).

=== Episode ep_212 (day 122) ===
On day 122, asset_00 projects that offered_in(product=product_15, asset=asset_11) will come to hold — recorded as forecast fct_1014.
Logged on day 122, policy rul_013 ("exempt_from policy 2"), with authority level 5, takes effect from day 122: if eligible_for(jurisdiction=?A, asset=asset_04, partner=?D) and restricted_in(sector=?B, partner=?D, asset=asset_23) and member_of(customer=customer_22, sector=?B, jurisdiction=?C), then exempt_from(jurisdiction=?A, sector=?B, jurisdiction2=?C) applies, unless partnered_with(partner=partner_19, product=product_00, sector=?B).

=== Episode ep_271 (day 263) ===
Policy rul_030 ("flagged_for policy 3 (revised)", authority level 3) was logged on day 263 and effective from day 263: if restricted_in(sector=?A, partner=partner_13, asset=asset_26) and requires_review(product=?E, jurisdiction=?B), then flagged_for(sector=?A, jurisdiction=?B) unless partnered_with(partner=partner_13, product=product_15, sector=sector_07) or operates_in(asset=asset_07, jurisdiction=?B).
Policy rul_036 ("flagged_for policy 1 (revised)", authority level 5) was logged on day 263 and effective from day 263: if restricted_in(sector=?A, partner=partner_01, asset=?D) and located_in(jurisdiction=?B, partner=partner_01) and member_of(customer=?E, sector=?A, jurisdiction=?F), then flagged_for(sector=?A, jurisdiction=?B) unless member_of(customer=?E, sector=sector_11, jurisdiction=jurisdiction_08).
Notice sup_006 records that, as of day 263, policy rul_030 replaces rul_016; from day 263 onward, rul_016 is no longer in effect.

=== Episode ep_255 (day 226) ===
Policy rul_032 ("approved_for policy 2 (revised)", authority level 4) takes effect on day 226: if restricted_in(sector=?A, partner=partner_02, asset=?C) and classified_as(product=?B, sector=?A), then approved_for(sector=?A, product=?B) — unless supplies(product=?B, partner=partner_12) — and is effective from day 226.
Notice sup_008, logged on day 226, records that rul_010 is superseded by rul_032 effective day 226; from that day, rul_010 no longer applies.

=== Episode ep_277 (day 278) ===
In The Cartographer's Debt, day 278 records partnered_with(partner=partner_18, product=product_23, sector=sector_01) — noted as fct_0923.
Policy rul_028 ("exempt_from policy 1 (revised)", authority level 5) is logged on day 278 and effective from day 278: IF requires_review(product=?D, jurisdiction=?A) AND classified_as(product=?D, sector=?B) AND operates_in(asset=asset_18, jurisdiction=?C) THEN exempt_from(jurisdiction=?A, sector=?B, jurisdiction2=?C), UNLESS operates_in(asset=asset_07, jurisdiction=?A) OR located_in(jurisdiction=?A, partner=partner_18).
Notice sup_004, logged on day 278, has policy rul_028 superseding rul_012 effective day 278; from that day, rul_012 no longer applies.

=== Episode ep_249 (day 213) ===
In the Whitewater drill, classified_as(product=product_18, sector=sector_01) is set aside on day 212 (fct_0963).
Under Whitewater, the planning exercise assumes classified_as(product=product_18, sector=sector_10) as of day 212 (fct_0964).
registry_A reports on day 213, effective from day 213, that supplies(product=product_18, partner=partner_12) — recorded as fct_0881.
For Whitewater, member_of(customer=customer_11, sector=sector_13, jurisdiction=jurisdiction_17) is treated as not holding on day 213 (fct_0957).
